element.label: div.shell
element.text: 神隠しKamikakushi黒沢家rice3.14Kcoin0❄️ 冬 WinterYear 2 · day 211li

logTail.text: You rest against the post. The ache dulls; the light through the slats shifts.
You rake the spilled rice back toward the basket. (+2 rice)
You rest against the post. The ache dulls; the light through the slats shifts.
You rake the spilled rice back toward the basket. (+2 rice)
"I mean to rise past a kept hand."
logTail.speaker: You

logTail.text: "...Ambition, in a hand kept a day. Mind it doesn't outrun your worth."
logTail.speaker: Genemon

logTail.text: The gate and the swept forecourt are yours to work now — stores come and go here.
The terraced home paddies open to you — the rice that feeds the house.
You begin to mark the turning of the days, and the four seasons with them.
Rank ↑ — Kept hand 下人
The estate's own state of repair is yours to tend now — spend the house's surplus to shore it up.
The rice you clear and grow is food, not only trade — a plain bowl of it fills a hollow belly and puts you back to work the faster.
You rest against the post. The ache dulls; the light through the slats shifts.
You take a bowl of plain rice. (−2 rice)
You rest against the post. The ache dulls; the light through the slats shifts.
The estate gate and its swept forecourt — the ground the whole house turns on.
The grain-store where you woke — dark, dry, close with the smell of old rice.
The estate gate and its swept forecourt — the ground the whole house turns on.
Terraced paddies stepping down the slope — the rice that keeps the house fed.
The estate gate and its swept forecourt — the ground the whole house turns on.
